pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: You can buy a package directly, or top up balance first and use the service on demand.
pricing.package_hint: Best for stable usage. You get a daily allowance plus emergency capacity with clearer cost boundaries.
pricing.balance_hint: Best for quick trials or elastic usage. Top up first, then pay as you go.

package_status.empty_description: There is no active package right now. You can buy a package from the pricing page or top up balance to try the service first.

status_hint.created: The order is created and waiting for payment
status_hint.pending: Payment has been initiated and the result is being confirmed
status_hint.paid: Payment is confirmed and fulfillment is being reconciled
status_hint.fulfilled: Payment and fulfillment are both completed
status_hint.failed: Payment did not succeed. You can start payment again
status_hint.canceled: The order has been canceled and will not continue

edit.protocol_hint: Choose the protocol by the upstream API spec, not by model name. Bearer + /v1/responses or /v1/chat/completions usually means OpenAI; x-api-key + /v1/messages usually means Anthropic.

model_tester.title: Model Test
model_tester.hint: Shows the models selected in step 2 and lets you choose the real upstream endpoint for each model. Text models default to /v1/responses and can be switched to /v1/chat/completions or /v1/messages. Other model types use fixed endpoints. Supports both single-row and bulk testing.
model_tester.task_created: {{count}} test tasks submitted, {{reused}} active tasks reused.
model_tester.selection_notice: Model test results are only used to diagnose channel capability and do not change whether a selected model can be used. As long as the model is selected, it can still be used when creating or editing groups.
model_tester.verify_required: Please finish the current model tests before continuing.
model_tester.empty: No testable models yet. Please select models in step 2 first.
model_tester.download_failed: Failed to download the test artifact
model_tester.download_unavailable: No downloadable artifact is available for this test result
model_tester.stale: Connection info, model selection, or endpoint changed. Please run model tests again.
model_tester.untested: The current endpoint has not been tested yet.

monitor.title: Monitor Settings
monitor.max_response_time_placeholder: In seconds, channels exceeding this time during testing will be automatically disabled
monitor.quota_reminder_placeholder: Users will receive email reminders when balance falls below this value

retry.title: Retry Settings
retry.description: This setting controls whether Router should continue trying other candidate channels for the same model in the current group after the first upstream failure within the same request.
retry.description_effective: When enabled, as long as the error is retryable, no specific channel is pinned, and there are still unused candidate channels, Router will try all remaining candidates once.
retry.description_disabled: When disabled, the first failure is returned immediately. When enabled, channels that already failed in the same request will not be retried again, and Router stops only after all candidates fail or one attempt succeeds.

general.title: General Settings
general.topup_link_placeholder: e.g.: Card selling website purchase link

general.quota_per_unit_placeholder: How many YYC 1 USD converts to

billing.title: Billing Currencies
billing.subtitle: Maintain upstream billing currencies and their YYC conversion rates. Provider prices are calculated in the original currency first, then converted to YYC for settlement.
